config.asyncparticles.tick.particleLimit: Set the maximum particle number for each ParticleRenderType.
config.asyncparticles.tick.particleLight: Weather to enable particle light cache.
config.asyncparticles.tick.asyncAnimatio: Execution mode for async animation tick. (cancellable, force-complete, disabled)
config.asyncparticles.tick.asyncParticle: Execution mode for async particle tick. (cancellable, force-complete, disabled)
config.asyncparticles.tick.failPerSecLim: Set the maximum number of ticking failures per second for each particle class or end tick operation. If exceeded, handle according to the behavior specified in 'Fail Behavior' option.
Set the behavior when the fail per second limit is exceeded. (raise-exception, mark-as-sync)
config.asyncparticles.tick.suppressCME.t: Whether to suppress ConcurrentModificationException (under fail limit)
config.asyncparticles.rendering.asyncPar: Wether to enable async particle rendering.
config.asyncparticles.rendering.failPerS: Set the maximum number of rendering failures per second for each particle class. If exceeded, handle according to the behavior specified in 'Fail Behavior' option.
config.asyncparticles.rendering.failBeha: Set the behavior when the fail per second limit is exceeded. (raise-exception, mark-as-sync)
config.asyncparticles.mod-compat.valkyri: Set the rain effect on Valkyrien Skies Mod's ships.
Whether to fix particle lights on Valkyrien Skies's ships.
Set the rain effect on Create Mod's contraptions.
config.asyncparticles.error.cloth_config: Please install Cloth Config API to access the config menu.
